modules.name: Low-Light
modules.notes: See clearly in near-darkness. SR2E p.247.

modules.name: Thermographic
modules.notes: See heat signatures through smoke and darkness. SR2E p.247.

modules.name: Flare Compensation
modules.notes: Protects against blinding flashes and glare. SR2E p.247.

modules.name: Camera
modules.notes: Records what the eye sees. SR2E p.247.

modules.name: Cosmetic Modification
modules.notes: Custom appearance — natural or outlandish. No essence cost. SR2E p.247.

modules.name: Retinal Duplication
modules.notes: Forges a retinal print to fool scanners — illegal. SR2E p.247.

system.notes: SR2E p.247. Prosthetic cybereyes (base 0.2 Essence). They accept vision-enhancement modules up to 0.5 Essence at no further cost; only module essence beyond that adds to the total. Toggle the modules your eyes carry below.
